description: B52Club - Một trong những điểm nổi bật của nền tảng là khả năng hoạt động mượt mà trên nhiều thiết bị và trình duyệt khác nhau. Giao diện được tối ưu để các danh mục hiển thị trực quan, giúp việc tìm kiếm nội dung yêu thích trở nên dễ dàng. WEB: https://b52clubb.store/

title: Carlow Connects Podcast
author: Paddy Carroll
description:
Welcome to Carlow Connects. I'm Paddy Carroll.


Carlow is a small county, but, what's happening here in terms of business is anything but small.


Every corner of this county, from the town to the townland, there are people doing really interesting things. Building businesses, creating jobs, making things happen quietly in the background without a whole lot of fuss.


I love is how connected it all is. One business feeds into another, one person knows someone who knows someone, and before you know it, you realise that Carlow has this incredible network just... humming away.


Every episode I sit down with someone whose business caught my eye, and we just have a proper & open chat, on how sports, politics, entertainment, sponsorship, coffee, connects us all in business, as well as how these business owners became what they are today.


What drives these people, Where they started, what drives them, and how they fit into the bigger picture of what's going on here.


It all connects.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

description: b52Club - Dù sử dụng điện thoại Android, iPhone hay máy tính để bàn, người dùng đều có thể truy cập thuận tiện mà không gặp nhiều trở ngại. title: ECP: European Cultural Parliament
author: Robert Pyrah
description:
The ECP is an independent forum, founded in the premises of the Council of Europe, Strasbourg (2001) to strengthen the role of cultural and artistic ideas and initiatives in Europe. It promotes dialogue between citizens of Eastern and Western Europe and between the various arts sectors. It fosters debate about issues of importance for cooperation, democracy and culture, and passes resolutions for the attention of politicians and beyond.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: ManClub
author: ManClubtravel
description: ManClub - Người dùng có thể nhanh chóng làm quen với các chức năng mà không cần nhiều thời gian tìm hiểu. Tốc độ phản hồi ổn định giúp quá trình sử dụng diễn ra liền mạch, hạn chế gián đoạn. Hệ thống cũng thường xuyên cập nhật tính năng mới nhằm cải thiện trải nghiệm, mang đến không gian giải trí sinh động, phù hợp với nhiều đối tượng có nhu cầu thư giãn sau những giờ học tập WEB: https://manclub.travel/

title: Twenty Thousand Hertz
description:
The stories behind the world's most recognizable and interesting sounds.

Whether you're a professional audio engineer with decades of experience, a fourth grader who loves sound and music, or anyone in between, Twenty Thousand Hertz will help unlock your sonic world… from the sound design secrets of hit movies, to the sonic craft of jingles and device sounds, to the forgotten backstories of classic theme songs, to linguistic mysteries, psychoacoustics, video game music, animal communication, and beyond. With moving human stories, immersive sound design, and the guiding voice of host Dallas Taylor, Twenty Thousand Hertz has grown into the world’s leading podcast about sound.


New to the show? Start here:

• I'm Lovin' It: How “Ba da ba ba ba” took over the world

• The Art of Foley: Bringing Slimer & Batman to life

• Tudum! The story behind the iconic Netflix sound

• The Legend of Zelda: A Beep to the Past

• Inside Hans Zimmer’s Remote Control Studios

• A sonic journey through the Solar System

• Mind the Gap: NYC & London’s iconic transit voices

title: Phonics World Pune
author: phonics-world-pune
description: Phonics World Pune is a leading provider of phonics classes in Pune for children aged 2.5 to 12 years. Since 2012, we have helped children build strong reading, spelling, pronunciation, vocabulary, and communication skills through structured phonics programs, Hindi phonics classes, Marathi phonics classes, and public speaking classes for kids. Our age-specific programs include phonics classes for nursery kids, LKG phonics classes, UKG phonics classes, and phonics classes for Class 1 & 2 students. description:
Straight talk on networking & security!
 
Every week there's a new phrase, trend or acronym dominating the networking & security conversations. Too often, the buzzwords get in the way of what you really want to know: What does it actually mean? Why does it matter? And how will it help my organisation?
 
That's where Buzz Off comes in. Hosted by Oli Chapman, Head of Networking & Security at Computacenter, we bring together experts from leading technology and security organisations to explore the biggest topics shaping the industry today.
 
But there's one rule: leave the buzzwords at the door. No jargon. No marketing speak. No hiding behind industry clichés.
 
Instead, expect honest conversations about today's challenges, emerging technologies, evolving threats, and the practical steps organisations can take to stay secure, connected, and successful.

title: Bible (Fenton) NT 06-27: Romans to Revelation, The by Ferrar Fenton Bible
description:
Work on the translation began in 1853 by a London businessman named Ferrar Fenton (1832–1920). The complete Bible was first published in 1903, though parts were published as separate volumes during the preceding 11 years. The translation is noted for a rearranging of the books of the Bible into what the author believed was the correct chronological order. In the Old Testament, this order follows that of the Hebrew Bible. The name of God was translated throughout the Old Testament as "The Ever-Living". The Bible is described as "translated into English direct from the original Hebrew, Chaldee, and Greek languages." For his translation of the Book of Job which appeared in 1898, Fenton was assisted by Henrik Borgström. This was "rendered into the same metre as the original Hebrew, word by word and line by line". His translation of the New Testament is based on the Greek text of Westcott and Hort. The ordering novelty in the New Testament is that it places the Gospel of John and the First Epistle of John at the beginning before the Gospel of Matthew, thus placing the Acts of the Apostles immediately after the Gospel of Luke.

Notable as well, is Ferrar Fenton's restoration of the Psalms into the musical verse form as close to the original as he could get. The Psalms were, quite literally, songs, complete with instructions for the "choirmaster" as well as descriptions of the appropriate musical instruments to be used. Today Psalm 48, Psalm 137, and Psalm 23 are still sung in churches, albeit to tunes not the original. (Summary by Wikipedia)

author: A. E. H. Veenman

December 15th, 2038.

My name's Greg Johnson, an emergency response technician over at Saint Lucia's downtown...well...a former EMT. If you're listening to my channel, then you already know. There are no more hospitals.

People reach out to me over the airwaves. Some ask how it all started. Weren’t there any warnings? How could emergency services not see this coming? Well, I knew as much as you.

Then there are others I come across during recon of the city and outer boroughs. Those are the ones I'll talk about in this series. They are the people who need my help.

description:
“I Know A Guy.”

That’s the phrase behind The Mic Hamptons Podcast, hosted by Michael Petersohn — Hamptons real estate agent, connector, and President of the Hamptons Networking Group.

Each episode features honest, relationship-driven conversations with the trusted professionals behind Hamptons real estate and luxury homeownership — the contractors, builders, designers, home inspectors, electricians, landscapers, title experts, property managers, and local business owners who help keep the Hamptons running. Because out east, the “who’s who” isn’t always celebrities — it’s the people you trust when buying, selling, building, renovating, maintaining, and managing a home.

Part Hamptons real estate podcast.
Part local business spotlight.
Part insider guide to the trusted people behind the Hamptons lifestyle and luxury homes.

Whether you own a home, are buying property, managing a renovation, or simply want to know the best local experts in the Hamptons, this podcast connects you to the people who make things happen.

Because in the Hamptons, knowing a guy matters.
And Michael Petersohn knows a guy.

title: Kimmie Kitten True Crime
author: Kimberleigh Sherrell
description:
Kimmie Kitten True Crime is a Southern true crime podcast that tells the stories nobody can forget: the murders, the missing, and the unsettling. Rooted in small-town Southern storytelling, each episode walks through the facts of a case with a steady hand, but it ain’t ever dry, honey. It’s real, a little funny, and a little sharp—like a conversation you didn’t mean to get pulled into at the gas station, but suddenly you’re invested. And if the guilty shows up in the comments…bless ‘em, we’ve already made the next episode. 
Oh, and sometimes I like to yap at special guests! Snacks and drinks!

description:
Life As It Is is a weekly podcast that dives deep into the honest, unfiltered moments of life - the beautiful ones, the messy ones, and the ones that transform us quietly. Hosted by Ejiro Agbonifo - a mother of six, geologist, life coach, counselor, and storyteller. This podcast explores real-life lessons, motivation, faith, and the grace that meets us in the middle of our everyday journey.
If you’ve ever felt overwhelmed, inspired, lost, hopeful, tired, or ready for a fresh start, then this podcast is for you.… Because life May not always be perfect but there’s always a lesson & grace 🙌
